/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/imp.dir/imp.cpp.o -o imp   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib:/usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64 /home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64/libnvrtc.so /home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64/libcudart.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/hahha/miniconda3/envs/pytorch/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so
